mnemonics: OXFORD: Outcomes eXplored For Optimal Rational Decisions
keyPoints: Focuses on the interplay between algorithmic decision-making and strategic behavior.
Analyzes how self-interested agents interact in systems defined by algorithms.
Key applications include online auctions, routing networks, and resource allocation mechanisms.
commonMistakes: Confusing it with general game theory; AGT specifically incorporates computational limits and complexity.
Assuming all players have perfect information; many models account for limited or private information.
Overlooking the price of anarchy, which measures how efficiency degrades due to selfish behavior.
